no service pad
service password-encryption
service timestamps debug datetime msec localtime
service timestamps log datetime msec localtime
service tcp-keepalives-in
service tcp-keepalives-out
!
hostname SW-ACC-01
!
no ip domain-lookup
ip domain-name example.lan
no ip http server
no ip http secure-server
no vstack
!
! --- AUTENTICAZIONE LOCALE / ENABLE ---
enable secret En4ble!
username netadmin privilege 15 secret S3cr3t!
aaa new-model
aaa authentication login default local
aaa authorization exec default local
login block-for 120 attempts 5 within 60
login on-failure log
login on-success log
!
! --- SSH-ONLY MANAGEMENT ---
crypto key generate rsa modulus 2048
ip ssh version 2
ip ssh time-out 60
ip ssh authentication-retries 3
!
! --- VTP ---
vtp mode transparent
!
! --- VLAN DATABASE ---
vlan 10
 name DATA
vlan 20
 name VOICE
vlan 30
 name VLAN30
!
! --- INTERFACCIA DI MANAGEMENT ---
interface Vlan99
 ip address 10.0.99.10 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
exit
ip default-gateway 10.0.99.1
!
! --- SPANNING-TREE ---
spanning-tree mode rapid-pvst
spanning-tree extend system-id
spanning-tree portfast bpduguard default
!
! --- ERRDISABLE AUTO-RECOVERY ---
errdisable recovery cause bpduguard
errdisable recovery cause psecure-violation
errdisable recovery cause storm-control
errdisable recovery interval 300
!
! --- DHCP SNOOPING ---
ip dhcp snooping
ip dhcp snooping vlan 10,20
no ip dhcp snooping information option
!
! --- CDP / LLDP ---
cdp run
no lldp run
!
! --- PORTE ACCESS (EDGE) ---
interface range GigabitEthernet1/0/1-24
 switchport mode access
 switchport access vlan 10
 switchport nonegotiate
 spanning-tree portfast
 spanning-tree bpduguard enable
 switchport port-security
 switchport port-security maximum 2
 switchport port-security violation restrict
 switchport port-security aging time 2
 switchport port-security aging type inactivity
 storm-control broadcast level 5.00
 storm-control action trap
 ip dhcp snooping limit rate 15
 no shutdown
exit
!
! --- PORTE TRUNK (UPLINK) ---
interface range GigabitEthernet1/0/47-48
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20,30
 switchport nonegotiate
 ip dhcp snooping trust
 channel-group 1 mode active
 no shutdown
exit
interface Port-channel1
 switchport mode trunk
 switchport trunk allowed vlan 10,20,30
 switchport nonegotiate
 ip dhcp snooping trust
 no shutdown
exit
!
! --- BANNER ---
banner motd ^CAccesso riservato^C
!
! --- NTP ---
ntp server 10.0.0.1
ntp server 10.0.0.2
!
! --- LOGGING ---
logging buffered 16384
logging host 10.0.0.5
logging trap informational
logging source-interface Vlan99
!
! --- SNMPv3 ---
snmp-server group RO-GRP v3 priv
snmp-server user snmpuser RO-GRP v3 auth sha authpwd123 priv aes 128 privpwd123
!
! --- HARDENING VTY / CONSOLE ---
line con 0
 login local
 exec-timeout 5 0
line vty 0 15
 login local
 exec-timeout 5 0
 transport input ssh
!
end
